rationale: Following Review 2 removes the literal no-op includeRight_apply (defeq by rfl to the def) and three redundant @[simp] wrappers around Bialgebra.TensorProduct.* (all visible by the map def and Mathlib @[simp] names in the diff), yielding a materially smaller public surface with no loss of functionality; Review 1's approve leaves these in, which is worse for api-design.
